title: Do evas jump using their AT Field sometimes
display_title: Do evas jump using their AT Field sometimes
wikitext:
[]: Do evas jump using their A.T. Field sometimes?             Quote Post by Trinity the Duelist » Tue Jun 02, 2015 6:16 pm Obviously they can jump using their limbs, but sometimes they appear to magically fling themselves into the air. Sorry if this is supposed to be under Evangelion Chit-Chat.

[]:             Quote Post by Gob Hobblin » Tue Jun 02, 2015 7:24 pm Yes, they do. The AT Fields are the primary reason why the Evas are able to move like they do, as well as violate the principals of the Square/Cube Law.

Article: Do evas jump using their AT Field sometimes
[]: Do evas jump using their A.T. Field sometimes?             Quote Post by Trinity the Duelist » Tue Jun 02, 2015 6:16 pm Obviously they can jump using their limbs, but sometimes they appear to magically fling themselves into the air. Sorry if this is supposed to be under Evangelion Chit-Chat.

[]:             Quote Post by Gob Hobblin » Tue Jun 02, 2015 7:24 pm Yes, they do. The AT Fields are the primary reason why the Evas are able to move like they do, as well as violate the principals of the Square/Cube Law.
